prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-HEROCLIPMINI-BLU-210011-401 Product Type: CARABINER Brand (from catalog): HEROCLIP Existing Title: HEROCLIP Carabiner Clip and Hook (Mini) for Travel, Luggage, (Blue Steel) Description: Our tiny but mighty Heroclip Mini gear clip lets you hook and hang small items, such as bags and toiletry kits from towel racks, lights from a tent or a tree branch, or tiny speakers from a wire shelf. And the mini size is perfect for slipping into a pocket or purse, so you have an extra helping hand whenever you need it.

This versatile gear clip hangs securely, rotates 360 degrees, and folds compactly in ways other carabiners, clips and hooks can’t, helping you keep your gear organized and exactly where you want it, no matter the activity. The clip also features a wider clip gate compared to standard carabiners and clips, and a hook with a grippy rubber tip.

PLEASE NOTE: This product is not designed for climbing. Search Terms: carabiner carabiner clip carabiner keychain locking carabiner small carabiner keychain accessories keychain wallet wristlet keychain cute keychain wallet keychain keychain for boyfriend keychain lanyard safety keychain for women keychain for men Features: - HEROCLIP is the world's first 3-in-1 clip and hook that can hang just about anything, just about anywhere! - HANG STUFF SECURELY: Heroclip Mini can hold up to 40 lbs and the rubber tip creates optimal grip so your stuff stays secure. - COMPACT DESIGN: Hook and clip nest together when not in use. SIZE MINI gate clearance 1.1", hook clearance 1.5", dimensions when open 1.8" x 4.6". - COUNTLESS USES: Once you have it, You'll use it for EVERYTHING - BUILT TO LAST: Aircraft-grade aluminum measuring at 1.9" wide, 2.25" high (closed), Weight: 0.7 oz. WARNING: Not for climbing or other use where disconnection may result in bodily harm or property damage. === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: HEROCLIP Mini Carabiner Clip and Hook, Blue Steel

openai.item_name: HEROCLIP Mini Carabiner Clip and Hook Blue Steel

anthropic.title_differentiation: 360-Degree Rotation, 40 Lb Capacity, Rubber Grip Tip, Aircraft-Grade Aluminum, Compact Foldable Design

openai.title_differentiation: 40 Lb Hold, 360 Degree Rotation, Compact Folding Design, Wide Gate, Rubber Tip, Travel Ready For Bags And Gear
